outline.title: Climo Weather App
outline.summary: Production-ready native Android weather application built with Jetpack Compose and Kotlin, demonstrating modern Android development best practices.
outline.image_plan: Use a suitable image if needed

outline.title: Project Overview
outline.summary: Climo is a modern weather app with MVVM architecture, Jetpack Compose UI, reactive StateFlow state management, and free Open-Meteo API integration.
outline.image_plan: Use a suitable image if needed

outline.title: Core Features
outline.summary: Real-time weather dashboard, 7-day forecast, coordinate search functionality, Material 3 dark theme, error handling, and loading states.
outline.image_plan: Use a suitable image if needed

outline.title: MVVM Architecture
outline.summary: Clean separation of concerns with UI layer, ViewModel, Repository, Network layer, and Open-Meteo API integration.
outline.image_plan: Use a suitable image if needed

outline.title: Technology Stack
outline.summary: Kotlin 1.9.22, Jetpack Compose, Retrofit 2.10.0, OkHttp 4.12.0, Kotlinx Serialization, Material 3, StateFlow, Gradle 8.2.0, Android API 24-34.
outline.image_plan: Use a suitable image if needed

outline.title: Project Structure
outline.summary: Complete file organization with 11 Kotlin files, 5 XML configurations, 3 Gradle build files, organized by layers: model, network, repository, viewmodel, ui, util.
outline.image_plan: Use a suitable image if needed

outline.title: Data Models
outline.summary: Kotlin data classes for WeatherResponse, CurrentWeather, DailyForecast with helper functions for weather descriptions and emoji icons.
outline.image_plan: Use a suitable image if needed

outline.title: Network Integration
outline.summary: Retrofit service interface for Open-Meteo API with Kotlinx Serialization, OkHttp configuration, 30-second timeouts, and no API key requirement.
outline.image_plan: Use a suitable image if needed

outline.title: State Management
outline.summary: WeatherState sealed class with Loading, Success, Error states. ViewModel with StateFlow for reactive state management and coordinate updates.
outline.image_plan: Use a suitable image if needed

outline.title: UI Components
outline.summary: Jetpack Compose composables including WeatherScreen, LoadingScreen, SuccessScreen, ErrorScreen, CurrentWeatherCard, ForecastCard, and SearchCoordinatesSection.
outline.image_plan: Use a suitable image if needed

outline.title: Material 3 Theme
outline.summary: Dark and light color schemes with Material 3 design system, system-aware theming, dynamic colors for Android 12+, and custom typography scales.
outline.image_plan: Use a suitable image if needed

outline.title: Building & Deployment
outline.summary: Prerequisites, quick build commands, run on device/emulator, release APK generation, and default New York City location.
outline.image_plan: Use a suitable image if needed

outline.title: Error Handling
outline.summary: Result wrapper pattern, handling network errors, invalid coordinates, timeouts, serialization errors, with user-friendly error messages and retry functionality.
outline.image_plan: Use a suitable image if needed

outline.title: Code Quality
outline.summary: Type safety, reactive programming with StateFlow, performance optimization with memoization and LazyColumn, testability with dependency injection ready.
outline.image_plan: Use a suitable image if needed

outline.title: Extending the App
outline.summary: Add Hilt DI, location services, local caching with Room, unit tests, and additional features to enhance the application.
outline.image_plan: Use a suitable image if needed

outline.title: Key Takeaways
outline.summary: Complete production-ready app, modern MVVM architecture, Jetpack Compose UI, reactive state management, comprehensive documentation, ready to deploy.
outline.image_plan: Use a suitable image if needed

outline.title: Thank You
outline.summary: Climo Weather App - production-ready native Android application built with Jetpack Compose, Material 3, Kotlin, StateFlow, and Open-Meteo API.
